where.if: AND (o.order_id::TEXT ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%' OR o.member_nm ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%' OR m.member_email ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%' OR o.recv_nm ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%' OR o.recv_phone ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%')

mapper.select: SELECT o.*, m.member_email, m.member_phone AS member_phone_origin, m.grade_cd, m.total_purchase_amt, s.site_nm, cou.coupon_nm, cou.coupon_type_cd, cd_os.code_label AS order_status_cd_nm, cd_pm.code_label AS pay_method_cd_nm, cd_ds.code_label AS dliv_status_cd_nm, cd_rb.code_label AS refund_bank_cd_nm, cd_ap.code_label AS appr_status_cd_nm, cd_at.code_label AS appr_target_cd_nm FROM od_order o LEFT JOIN mb_member m ON m.member_id = o.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_site s ON s.site_id = o.site_id LEFT JOIN pm_coupon cou ON cou.coupon_id = o.coupon_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_os ON cd_os.code_grp = 'ORDER_STATUS' AND cd_os.code_value = o.order_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pm ON cd_pm.code_grp = 'PAY_METHOD' AND cd_pm.code_value = o.pay_method_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ds ON cd_ds.code_grp = 'DLIV_STATUS' AND cd_ds.code_value = o.dliv_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rb ON cd_rb.code_grp = 'BANK_CODE' AND cd_rb.code_value = o.refund_bank_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ap ON cd_ap.code_grp = 'APPROVAL_STATUS' AND cd_ap.code_value = o.appr_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_at ON cd_at.code_grp = 'APPROVAL_TARGET' AND cd_at.code_value = o.appr_target_cd WHERE o.order_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM od_order o LEFT JOIN mb_member m ON m.member_id = o.member_id

SELECT oi.*, p.thumbnail_url, sk.sku_code, oi1.opt_item_nm AS opt_item_nm_1, oi2.opt_item_nm AS opt_item_nm_2, cd_is.code_label AS order_item_status_cd_nm, cd_dc.code_label AS dliv_courier_cd_nm FROM od_order_item oi LEFT JOIN pd_prod p ON p.prod_id = oi.prod_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_sku sk ON sk.sku_id = oi.sku_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item oi1 ON oi1.opt_item_id = oi.opt_item_id_1 LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item oi2 ON oi2.opt_item_id = oi.opt_item_id_2 LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_is ON cd_is.code_grp = 'ORDER_ITEM_STATUS' AND cd_is.code_value = oi.order_item_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_dc ON cd_dc.code_grp = 'COURIER' AND cd_dc.code_value = oi.dliv_courier_cd WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY oi.reg_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO od_order (order_id, site_id, member_id, member_nm, orderer_email, total_amt, pay_amt, order_status_cd, pay_method_cd, recv_nm, recv_phone, recv_zip, recv_addr, recv_addr_detail, recv_memo, reg_by, reg_date) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{siteId}, #{memberId}, #{memberNm}, #{ordererEmail}, #{totalAmt}, #{payAmt}, #{orderStatusCd}, #{payMethodCd}, #{recvNm}, #{recvPhone}, #{recvZip}, #{recvAddr}, #{recvAddrDetail}, #{recvMemo}, #{regBy}, #{regDate})
